label: Main reasonable strategy
description: Baseline automation used for reputation and economy simulations: strong Season 1 margin, no post-season boosts, alternating pre-season 2 focus, then Season 2 entry.

preseason1.activity: Random among network (+10 visibility), workshop (+10 competence), or none per run seed.

hiring.rule: Fill Season 1 hire cap with random intern/full-time picks (same pattern as other sim scripts).

season1.clientPlanning: plannedClientCountForSeason(1, visibility, seed) for slot count; buildSeasonClients for queue.
season1.solutionChoice: DFS over all affordable Season-1 solution vectors maximizing total operating profit (sum of budgetSeason1 - costBudget on executed campaigns). If any execution is feasible, at least one campaign must execute.

postSeason1.choicePerClient: none only (no reach or effectiveness spend).

preseason2.focus: Alternate strategy_workshop vs network by run index (even/odd).

season2Entry.action: enterNextPreseason after Season 1 post-season, apply pre-season 2 focus, settlePreseasonAndEnterSeason('2').

rolloverResolutionNote: Optional extension: resolve Season 1 follow-ups in queue order with applySeason2CarryoverChoice; see simulate-main-strategy-rollover-metrics.ts for a scripted replay.
